content.title: Purpose
content.body: Would guide App Behavior journey planning from user goal through route/workflow touchpoints and proof implications.

content.title: Already Decision-Complete
content.body: UX guidance recognizes journeys and behavior modeling as App Behavior authoring concerns.

content.title: Needs Clarity
content.body: Needs deeper review of UX system model docs to decide exact journey fields, relationship mapping, and closure criteria.

content.title: Promotion Criteria
content.body: Promote when journey roadmap fields can be derived from existing App Behavior schema/model authority without invention.

content.title: Possible Outcomes
content.body: Promote to full template, merge into App Behavior roadmap, keep as optional appendix, or delete if real use does not justify it.

content.title: Non-Authority Warning
content.body: This placeholder is not a usable roadmap template and is not authority.
